title: Voices From Our Partners
sub: Owners who took the leap - and what the first year actually looked like.

items.name: Dev Patel
items.text: Opened a kiosk in eight weeks. The training and launch support meant I was never guessing - the model just works.

items.name: Marta Nowak
items.text: Footfall doubled in month three. Head office actually answers the phone, which I did not expect from a franchise.

items.name: Ibrahim Khan
items.text: Low entry cost, quick returns, and the brand does a lot of the selling for you. Opening my second site this year.
